data.topic: Always-on Android selective speaker transcription app
data.input_summary: Production-grade Android app for frontline workers that runs continuously, performs on-device speaker verification to filter only the enrolled user's speech, uploads verified segments to cloud STT for transcription with timestamps and GPS, supports Bluetooth mic switching, and includes a simple web dashboard for transcript review.

decisions.choice: On-device VAD + local speaker verification. Lightweight VAD detects speech activity, local embedding model verifies against enrolled user profile. Only verified audio segments leave the device.
decisions.reasoning: Best balance of privacy (no third-party audio sent to cloud), battery efficiency (VAD gates CPU-intensive verification), and legal safety (two-party consent compliance). Acceptable tradeoff: may miss first ~500ms of utterance during model wake.

decisions.choice: Speech-activity-driven chunked uploads with offline Room DB persistence queue. Chunks are verified speech segments (not fixed time windows), uploaded when connectivity is available.
decisions.reasoning: Since on-device VAD + verification filters silence and non-user speech, chunks are naturally speech-driven — no wasted empty data. Offline queue with Room DB handles field environments with intermittent or no connectivity. Retry on reconnect.

decisions.choice: Android app + simple web dashboard for transcript review.
decisions.reasoning: Makes the demo more compelling for Frontier Audio. Supervisors can review transcripts in a browser. Adds backend component but keeps scope reasonable.

decisions.choice: Evaluate during research: Deepgram Nova-2, AssemblyAI, Google Speech-to-Text v2 (Chirp), OpenAI Whisper API. Pick based on WER benchmarks for noisy environments, streaming vs batch support, timestamp granularity, and pricing.
decisions.reasoning: No existing relationship with any provider. Research phase should benchmark options against field environment audio characteristics before committing.

decisions.choice: Full offline persistence — audio segments and transcript data stored in Room DB, synced when connectivity returns. GPS data cached alongside.
decisions.reasoning: Implied by field environment use case. Extreme environments often have intermittent connectivity. Data loss is unacceptable for legal/operational records.

decisions.choice: Audio preprocessing pipeline with environmental noise cancellation before speaker verification and STT.
decisions.reasoning: Extreme field environments (wind, machinery, radio chatter) will degrade both speaker verification accuracy and STT WER without preprocessing. Gemini flagged this as missing requirement.

constraints.value: App must survive sleep, Doze, charger idle, low battery — only stops on full power-down
One-time voice enrollment at first app startup
GPS tagging on all transcription segments — location services always on
Bluetooth mic auto-switching with seamless fallback to built-in mic
LLM post-processing available for transcription error correction
Production-grade demo for Frontier Audio hiring partner submission
